tav.name: TAV Technologies
tav.description: Developed scalable UI components and global state management using Vue.js and Vuex. Worked on API integrations and optimized page load times to enhance performance.

ravenFrontend.name: Raven Technology
ravenFrontend.description: Built responsive interfaces and UI components using JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Worked on state management and API consumption to create seamless user experiences.

ravenBackend.name: Raven Technology
ravenBackend.description: Developed RESTful APIs for frontend and mobile applications, and designed data structures using MongoDB to ensure efficient data management.
